subheadline: A few moments from idea to a platform trusted by teams in 40 countries.

milestones.title: Idea on a whiteboard
milestones.description: Two founders quit their jobs and shipped the first working build in eight weeks.

milestones.title: First 1,000 customers
milestones.description: Hit profitability without outside funding and grew the team to twelve people.

milestones.title: Series A, $12M
milestones.description: Raised our first round to open European data centers and double engineering.

milestones.title: Teams in 40 countries
milestones.description: Crossed eight figures in recurring revenue and passed SOC 2 Type II.
